creator: yasu@freebsd.org
text:
While checking patches submitted as bug #255641 and bug #255647, I found INST_BASE option is broken with both mail/postfix and mail/postfix-current.

Followings are build log with 13.0-RELEASE amd64 and ports 9ca6e5fed9ba of main.

https://www.utahime.org/FreeBSD/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/130amd64-default-postfix/2021-05-06_20h24m35s/logs/postfix-base-3.5.10,1.log
https://www.utahime.org/FreeBSD/poudriere/data/logs/bulk/130amd64-default-postfix/2021-05-06_20h33m09s/logs/postfix-current-base-3.6.20210422,6.log
